data.text: LANDINGS AT 326,63 AND ITS VICINITY, INCLUDING THE SEAS, PRODUCED
SOME SCENIC GROUND/SKY COLOURS BUT NO LIFE.
FINALLY FOUND SOME VEGETATION AT 359,56 IN THE FORM OF LIGHT GREEN
GROUNDCOVER AND SPARSELY DISTRIBUTED PINKISH BUSHES. SIMILAR STUFF
MAY BE FOUND AT 1,65, ALONG WITH SEVERAL PONDS.
AT 0,38 THERE IS MORE VEGETATION, A FOREST, IN FACT.
AT 357,30 THERE IS QUITE A REFRESHING CHANGE OF SCENERY. LET'S START
WITH THE LANDSCAPE:SLOPING HILLSIDES DOMINATED BY ONE TALL HILL
OVERLOOKING A PLAIN FULL OF SMALL BLUISH PONDS UNDER A PURPLISH SKY
(NOT AS PRETTY AS THE EARLIER YELLOW SKIES THOUGH) THE VEGETATION IS
A DULL GREEN GREY, BUT THE MAIN HIGHLIGHT IS THE TRANSLUCENCY OF
THE TREE BARK. RYAN GJK E6011.787.837
